excerpt: Reviews orders for correct contact and delivery instructions. Keeps branches informed of next run out to facilitate proper staging of equipment. Monitors driver stop times and communicates to expedite when necessary. Monitors vehicle inspection program reporting (DVIR) and coordinates vehicle repairs with internal and external parties as needed.
Drivers use a mobile app to see load assignments, delivery details, routing, photos, and signatures.

Resolve customer issues instantly with electronic proof of delivery, signatures, and photos, along with easy access to past customer interactions. Reduce disputes, improve communication, and enhance your company’s reputation with driver management software.
Capture equipment condition with photos and avoid disputes — accelerating fee collection with fewer delays and maintaining solid relationships with customers.
